Name: FACE_EDIT_PARAM
Description: Defines adjustable facial customization parameters used by the character creator and face generation system.

Fields.Name: Minimum Adjustment Value
Fields.Description: Lowest value the facial parameter slider or adjustment can reach.

Fields.Name: Maximum Adjustment Value
Fields.Description: Highest value the facial parameter slider or adjustment can reach.

Fields.Name: FaceGen Parameter Name
Fields.Description: Specifies the internal FaceGen parameter controlled by this entry.

Fields.Name: Category
Fields.Description: Category grouping used to organize this facial parameter in the character customization menu.
Determines whether this facial parameter is used by montage-based facial editing or blending systems.

Fields.Name: Reverse Menu Control
Fields.Description: If enabled, reverses the direction of the menu slider or adjustment control for this parameter.
